title: Bray's World: A Vanilla+ Experience
description: A Vanilla+ resource pack that COMPLETELY overhauls the game, adding variated textures and custom models to nearly 1000 different blocks, items and entities while maintaining the vanilla feel of the game!
body:
![Welcome TITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ef3812797840de84de6dc81063e17ca980aa47a1.png)
### **I've personalized Minecraft's look and feel with my own touches and charm, and now you can have them, too!**
 
![Brays World Header](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/eb564d2b41517ff14a0ef541c06bbd61cbb8ac96.jpeg)

Welcome to Bray's official resource pack, Bray's World! This is a Vanilla+ pack that aims to maintain the base feel of the game while providing some 'extras' to spice things up and add some variety.

-------------------

<center>
  
[![Discord](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b716f9bf1f25106aea330ff2308302ce911dea3a.png)](https://discord.gg/H7JPX6hPQB)
[![Youtube](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e66483ab22160e1621066e9df3c259615edd2ba9.png)](https://www.youtube.com/@BraysWorld_MC)

</center>

--------------------


## Pack Features

![Custom Biome Colors](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4b00c3e53168d1b3d8f862b2d8e15c508b48e0a6.jpeg)
*Cattails possible with [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity), custom biome colors possible with [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)

![Custom Item Models TITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7ac55526d6228748cbd65ac6e017285cdc4068eb.png)

![Eating Animations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/813b05aee2c1eb775077b67e0c68448ac715c7c3.jpeg)

![3D Models](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ddc1b6119c8db27869e24ef2730fad5bdd2cc97a.jpeg)

![Mud Brick Texture Variations](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4474118aceaf324a102e070d2591a9067093f0b8.jpeg)


<details>
<summary>ALL BLOCKS WITH TEXTURE VARIATION</summary>

Packed Mud, Mud Bricks, Mud Brick Slab, Stone, Stone Brick, Mossy Stone Brick, Cobblestone, Mossy Cobblestone, Granite, Polished Granite, Polished Granite Slab, Andesite, Polished Andesite, Polished Andesite Slab, Tuff, Polished Tuff, Polished Tuff Slab, Deepslate, Polished Deepslate, Polished Deepslate Slab, Oak Planks, Spruce Planks, Birch Planks, Jungle Planks, Acacia Planks, Dark Oak Planks, Mangrove Planks, Cherry Planks, Pale Oak Planks, Bamboo Planks, Crimson Planks, Warped Planks, Birch Log, Bookshelf, Chiseled Bookshelf, Coal Ore, Deepslate Coal Ore, Iron Ore, Deepslate Iron Ore, Copper Ore, Deepslate Copper Ore, Gold Ore, Deepslate Gold Ore, Redstone Ore, Deepslate Redstone Ore, Emerald Ore, Deepslate Emerald Ore, Lapis Ore, Deepslate Lapis Ore, Diamond Ore, Deepslate Diamond Ore, Nether Quartz, Nether Gold, Gilded Blackstone, Block of Copper, Exposed Copper, Weathered Copper, Oxidized Copper, Cut Copper, Exposed Cut Copper, Weathered Cut Copper, Oxidized Cut Copper, Bamboo, Moss, Grass Block, Dirt, Coarse Dirt, Dirt Path, Short Grass, Bush, Red Mushroom, Brown Mushroom, Wildflowers, Lily Pad, Wheat Crop, Carrot Crop, Potato Crop, Beet Crop, Cactus, Poppy, Dandelion, Blue Orchid, Red Tulip, Orange Tulip, White Tulip, Pink Tulip, Oxeye Daisy, Cornflower, Lily Of The Valley, Azure Bluet, Closed Eyeblossom, Open Eyeblossom, Torchflower, Wither Rose, Rose Bush, Lilac, Peony, Sunflower, Potted Poppy, Potted Dandelion, Potted Blue Orchid, Potted Red Tulip, Potted Orange Tulip, Potted White Tulip, Potted Pink Tulip, Potted Oxeye Daisy, Potted Cornflower, Potted Lily Of The Valley, Potted Azure Bluet, Potted Closed Eyeblossom, Potted Open Eyeblossom, Potted Torchflower, Potted Wither Rose, Potted Red Mushroom, Potted Brown Mushroom



</details>



![Mob Variations TITLE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7b25296ee6dce5114f51a8004383e28bd58fa80f.png)
![Variated Mobs](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/df51ec6b33fff57ef4e38ffda05fb83900d28841_0.webp)

---------------------------

## **Compatibilities**

### **Bray's World Add-ons**
Alongside this pack, I am developing addition resource packs that can be used in conjunction with Bray's World. These are features that I felt were fun and brought something new to the game but may break the vanilla feel for some players and so I wanted to offer them as optional additions to the Bray's World family :)
- [Bray's Bushy Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/braysleaves)
- COMING SOON: Bray's 3D Tools and Weapons

### **Mods**
You can utilize the full potential of this resource pack by installing some mods and other compatible resource packs to add functionality such connected block textures, item and armor textures based on enchantments and names, and randomized/NBT-based entity textures and models, to name a few!

- [Entity Texture Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entitytexturefeatures)
- [Entity Model Features](https://modrinth.com/mod/entity-model-features)
- [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity)
- [Polytone](https://modrinth.com/mod/polytone)

### **Resource Packs**
- [Fresh Animations Resource Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations)
 
Note: When using the Fresh Animations resource pack alongside "Bray's World," make sure to put Fresh Animations below this resource pack in the resource pack hierarchy to correctly load mob textures and variations. I've designed the variated mob textures with Fresh Animation's model compatability in mind :)

---------------------

## Support

If you'd like to make suggestions or ask questions related to the pack, or even just want to stay up to date on the further development of this pack you should **[join us over on Discord!](https://discord.gg/H7JPX6hPQB)**

Also, while tips are never expected or required, if you're feeling generous **[why not buy me a coffee for my work?](https://paypal.me/braydickey)**
